pi_items.source: Inferred from task description step 1: 'Create a new Content Type named Editorial Review (machine name: editorial_review)'
Inferred from task description step 2: 'Add a field named Merchandise (machine name: field_merchandise)'
Found in /examples/drupal_commerce_env/scripts/seed_products.php line 45: 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' with sku 'SONY-WH1000XM5'

Drupal core provides 'teaser' as a standard view mode per https://www.drupal.org/docs/drupal-apis/entity-api/display-modes-view-modes-and-form-modes. Task description step 3 specifies 'using the Teaser view mode'

Drupal core EntityReferenceEntityFormatter class has plugin annotation with id='entity_reference_entity_view' and label='Rendered entity'. Verified at https://api.drupal.org/api/drupal/core!lib!Drupal!Core!Field!Plugin!Field!FieldFormatter!EntityReferenceEntityFormatter.php/class/EntityReferenceEntityFormatter/8.9.x

privileged_info_summary: The task implements a Shoppable Content feature by creating an 'Editorial Review' content type with a 'Merchandise' field that references Drupal Commerce products. All metadata claims are verified: the content type and field machine names follow standard Drupal conventions, the target product SKU 'SONY-WH1000XM5' exists in the seeded product database (Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones), the 'teaser' view mode is a standard Drupal core view mode, and 'entity_reference_entity_view' is the correct plugin ID for the 'Rendered entity' formatter which displays referenced entities using a configurable view mode. The product data is synthetic, created during environment setup via seed_products.php which seeds 12 products including the Sony headphones.
